name: Multi-Agent Debate (MAD)
description: Adversarial reasoning protocol to surface trade-offs and edge cases.

personae_debate.name: Personae Debate
personae_debate.description: Adversarial reasoning protocol to surface trade-offs.
personae_debate.context: Complex architectural choices or pattern selection.
personae_debate.implementation: 1. Invoke @Architect to propose a design. 2. Invoke @Bug-Hunter to challenge assumptions (RCA, edge cases). 3. Synthesize the debate into a consensus plan.

best_practices: Use distinct internal reasoning branches for each persona.
Document the 'Dissension' point if no consensus is reached.
anti_patterns: One persona agreeing with the other without critical analysis.
